items.title: FIFA official 2026 World Cup hub tracks fixtures, venues, and tournament updates
items.summary: Use the official FIFA tournament hub as the editorial reference for schedule, venue, and competition updates.

items.title: Maestro Messi scores again and breaks another record in the process
items.summary: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to score his sixth goal of the 2026 World Cup as Argentina beat Jordan 3-1 in Dallas and becomes the first player to score in seven World Cup games in a row.

items.title: Algeria and Austria both qualify for last 32 after dramatic injury-time goals
items.summary: Algeria and Austria each score injury-time goals in a 3-3 draw, a result which sees both sides qualify from Group J and into the last 32 of the FIFA World Cup.

items.title: Messi comes off the bench to score as Argentina beat Jordan
items.summary: Lionel Messi comes off the bench to become the first player in FIFA World Cup history to score in seven consecutive matches, as Argentina defeat Jordan 3-1 in their final game in Group J.

items.title: Where to watch the World Cup on the BBC and ITV
items.summary: All the TV and radio details for each of the 2026 World Cup knockout games.

items.title: Kane and Bellingham proved again why they are key players - Tuchel
items.summary: Thomas Tuchel says Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham proved once again why they are key players for England, after both men scored in a 2-0 win over Panama which sees Tuchel's team win Group L at the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: 'I leave nothing' - the end of 'toxic' Bielsa's Uruguay reign
items.summary: With Uruguay eliminated from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.

items.title: What is BBC's 3D Live Match Experience and how does it work?
items.summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains the unique way of following matches during the 2026 World Cup via the BBC

items.title: How to watch highlights of World Cup matches
items.summary: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains how you can watch match highlights and full match replays during the 2026 Fifa World Cup

items.title: Why are footballers wearing pink boots at the World Cup?
items.summary: The opening match of the 2026 World Cup was dominated by players wearing pink boots - but why is the colour so prevalent in football at the moment?

items.title: World Cup 2026: England win, Clarke quits Scotland and Iran denied at the last – live
items.summary:
⚽ All the latest news from as we reach the knockouts
⚽ Player guide | Power rankings | Golden Boot | Mail us

England reaction from our writers in New York/New Jersey.

Bellingham can be dismissed a little by some as a player of moments. Is that bad? Moments win games. Bellingham is 22 and still finding his final form. He promises to do these things, walks and talks like he might do them. But then he also does them, which seems important. With England paddling here, he had the will and the craft to take out the spoons and rattle something off on his knee just when they needed it most.

Continue reading...

items.title: World Cup 2026 power rankings: France still kings but who has climbed 26 places?
items.summary:
From Algeria to Uzbekistan, we assess the standing of the 48 nations after the group stage of the tournament

It took a little over an hour for Kylian Mbappé to find his groove. Irked by a poor refereeing decision, he scored twice in France’s opener against Senegal. Ably supported by a stunning cast, Mbappé will already have his sights on winning the competition. Michael Olise has shown his class throughout, while Ousmane Dembélé dazzled with a hat-trick against Norway. We’ll see if anyone can stop Didier Deschamps’ team.

Continue reading...
